name: @cntryl/fitz
description: TypeScript client library for Fitz distributed system

scripts.build: rolldown src/index.ts --file dist/index.mjs --format esm --platform node --sourcemap --external ws --clean-dir --tsconfig tsconfig.json && rolldown src/index.ts --file dist/index.cjs --format cjs --platform node --sourcemap --external ws --tsconfig tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node ./scripts/fix-dts-imports.js
scripts.test: vitest run --config vitest.unit.config.ts && vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts && vitest run --config vitest.conformance.config.ts --reporter=verbose
